title: UPPSC Assistant Registrar 2024 Final Result
description: UPPSC Assistant Registrar Final Result 2024: Apply for 38 Post Post Date: 28-04-2026 Short Description: UPPSC Assistant Registrar Recruitment 2024 Apply Online Form : UPPSC Assistant Registrar Online Form 2024, Notification has been released on the website @https://rpsc.Uttar Pradesh.gov.in/ & Application Form now started on 12 th Jan’24 for Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission Jobs 2024.
